name: YouTube Short Viral
description: Native dashboard + Remotion render + pipeline orchestration for the claude-yt-channel project. Replaces the standalone Next.js dashboard — visible directly inside OpenClaw at /__openclaw__/yt-channel/.

workspaceDir.description: Absolute path to the claude-yt-channel project root. Defaults to ${PROJECT_ROOT}.

remotionDir.description: Absolute path to the Remotion sub-project. Defaults to <workspaceDir>/remotion.

pythonBin.description: Python binary path for invoking the orchestrator. Defaults to python3 on PATH.

subprocess.purpose: Headless Remotion render of the Short composition
